## 📊 Sprint/Release Health Score

### Calculated Health Score

```

Components:
├── Pass Rate (25%): [PASS_SCORE]/25
├── Coverage (20%): [COVERAGE_SCORE]/20
├── Defect Rate (20%): [DEFECT_SCORE]/20
```

| Indicator | Status | Notes |

| **Flaky Tests < 5%** | [✅/❌] | Current: [FLAKY_PCT]% |
